basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: The G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website, gbpuat.ac.in. Candidates holding a B.Sc. (ZBC) qualification can submit their offline applications on or before 27-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are shared below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download GBPUAT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download GBPUAT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GBPUAT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GBPUAT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the GBPUAT Project Assistant position is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant position, candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree with ZBC (Zoology, Botany, Chemistry) as their specialization.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Assistant role will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in the G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the GBPUAT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology located?
faq.answer: The G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is located in Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263145.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CA/Ento./1346.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Assistant position is contractual.
